notes: Verify that for each defined opcode the combinational result matches the arithmetic/logic definition.
checks.pass_condition: For each stimulus where aluc matches a defined operation, r equals the expected arithmetic result of a and b, zero is 1 iff r==0, negative is 1 iff r[31]==1, overflow and carry follow the semantics of the operation, and flag is 1 only for SLT/SLTU.
checks.trigger_condition: When the plan case basic_001 drives concrete aluc values covering all defined opcodes.

notes: Ensure flag is only driven for SLT and SLTU, otherwise it may be high-impedance.
checks.pass_condition: If aluc equals SLT (6'b101010) or SLTU (6'b101011) then flag must be 1; for any other aluc, flag must be either 0 or high-impedance, never 1.
checks.trigger_condition: When edge_001 stimulates SLT, SLTU and other opcodes.
